blended.narrative: Powder King is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
